original_image_tags: A yellowed, rectangular sheet of paper with two hole-punch marks at the top. The paper appears to be thin, allowing the typewritten text from the reverse side to bleed through, creating a mirrored effect. The text is faded and ghostly. There are two blue "RECEIVED" stamps from the FBI Liaison Section, dated August 11 and August 26, 1947. A small piece of tape is affixed to the bottom left corner. The paper has rough edges, particularly at the top.

elements.description: The back of a document page containing faint, mirrored typed text from the reverse side, three black punch holes at the top, two blue 'RECEIVED LIAISON SECTION' stamps with dates 'Aug. 11 9 51 AM, 47' and 'Aug. 26 12 23 PM, 47', and two 'F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' stamps.

judge.reason: Both descriptions consistently identify the same key visual elements: mirrored bleed-through text, two blue 'RECEIVED' stamps with identical dates, and punch holes at the top.
